case_title: SINGLETON, ANGELA VS FLORES, MARTHA ELENA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGLETON, ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLORES, MARTHA ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
